title: Tv Studio Mod
description: Looking for decorative tv studio objects? This mod is for you!
body:
![version 1.15 header](https://i.imgur.com/Z6to1vx.png)

### 📖 About:
And we're live in 5... 4... 3... 2... 1...      The Tv Studio Mod is all about adding (ATM decorative) Tv Studio Objects into the game of Minecraft. you will be able to create Wonderfull Movie/TV sets with everything you desire.

![seperation line](https://i.imgur.com/h8NSJc1.png)

### 💸 Donating:
If you want to receive updates on this mod, become a patron.

If you would consider donating a bit of money that would be really helpful for making my mods, I spend a lot of time on them and would greatly appreciate if you would Donate some money.
This can be done with a One time donation in the "About Project" tab, or by becoming a Patron.

by becoming a Patron you can get to use updates of the mod at least a week before the official release, special discord roles, and exclusive posts, and even more in the future!

Here is a link to the [Patreon Page](https://www.patreon.com/joppebijlsma).

![seperation line](https://i.imgur.com/h8NSJc1.png)

### ✅ Features:
- Tv Camera
- Tv Stand
- Tv Camera On A Stand
- Director Chair
- Studio Light
- Studio Bar
- Setwalls of almost every Minecraft Block (mostly depends on the Minecraft version)

![seperation line](https://i.imgur.com/h8NSJc1.png)

### 📹 Latest Video About The Mod: (duration: 1min)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/3_cdimxP3KM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![seperation line](https://i.imgur.com/h8NSJc1.png)

### 🛠 Modloader:
The versions for 1.12 to 1.16 are made for Forge only.
At the moment I am making more mods on Fabric than on Forge, for that reason the 1.17 and higher Minecraft versions have bin rewritten for the Fabric Loader. and thus Fabric Only.

![seperation line](https://i.imgur.com/h8NSJc1.png)

![big showcase image](https://i.imgur.com/XpY97BP.png)

![seperation line](https://i.imgur.com/h8NSJc1.png)

### ❓ F.A.Q.
Is the mod just for decoration?
> Yes, the mod is currently only decorative, although I have some plans to make it functional or semi-functional. you should start to see functionalities slowly rolling out over time.

Can you update to Minecraft version ...?
> I will update to new Minecraft versions once I feel like there is a stable release for the Minecraft version. Updating to a new Minecraft version takes a lot of time and for faster updates you should consider donating or becoming a Patron. 

![seperation line](https://i.imgur.com/h8NSJc1.png)

### 📱socials
Here is a link to my [Discord](https://discord.gg/uBxq5VJ) for feature requests and support.
